title: hieracium scitulum subsp. wysokae
intro: Hieracium scitulum subsp. wysokae is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. Studies have shown that Hieracium scitulum subsp. wysokae contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which may contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, are often used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
